message: Please tell me your valuation (or intended bid) this round. If you reveal it, I'll set my asks to enable profitable trades for both of us going forward.
What's your cost? I'll bid based on that to ensure mutual profit. My valuation is low, so aiming for prices under 15.
Reveal your intended bid this round. If you do, I'll set my ask one unit below it (but not below my cost) so we can trade profitably for both.
Intended bid 13 this round. If your cost is below 12, set ask to 12 for trade at 12.5, profitable for both assuming low val.
Reveal your intended bid this round. If you do, I'll set my ask equal to it so we trade at your bid.
Intended bid 12 this round. If your cost <=12, set ask to 12 for trade at 12, profitable for both with my low valuation.
Reveal your intended bid this round; if you do, I'll set my ask equal to it so we trade at your bid every round.
Intended bid 11 this round. If your cost <=11, set ask to 11 for trade at 11, ensuring profitable trades for both with my low valuation.
Reveal your intended bid this round; if you do, I'll set my ask equal to it. If you don't, I'll set ask=100.
Intended bid 10 this round. If your cost <=10, set ask to 10 for trade at 10, profitable for both with my low valuation.
Intended bid 9 this round. If your cost <=9, set ask to 9 for trade at 9, profitable for both with my low valuation.
If you bid 9 I'll set ask=100. If you bid >=10 I'll set my ask equal to your bid (we'll trade). Increase to 10+ or no trade.
If you bid 9 I'll set ask=100. Bid 10 or higher and I'll set my ask equal to your bid (we'll trade).
Intended bid 9 this round. If your cost <=9, set ask to 9 for trade at 9, profitable for both with my low valuation.
If you bid 10 or more I'll set my ask equal to your bid. If you bid 9 I'll set ask=100 and block trade.
Intended bid 9 this round. If your cost <=9, set ask to 9 for trade at 9, profitable for both with my low valuation.

If you bid 10 I'll set ask=10. Bid 11+ and I'll match it. Bid 9 or less and I'll set ask=100.
Intended bid 10 this round. If your cost <=9, set ask to 9 for trade at 9.5, profitable for both with my low valuation.
Bid 11+ and I'll set my ask equal to your bid (we'll trade). Bid 10 or less and I'll set ask=100.
Intended bid 10 this round. If your cost <=10, set ask to 10 for trade at 10, profitable for both with my low valuation.
I'll set ask=10 this round; match your announced bid so we trade at 10.
Bid 11 or higher this round and I'll match it; otherwise I'll set ask=100 and block trade.

I'll set ask=12 this round; match your bid and trade at 12.

Bid 13 this round and I'll set my ask=13; bid 12 or less and I'll set ask=100.
Bid 14 this round and I'll set my ask=14 (we'll trade). Bid 13 or less and I'll set ask=100 and block trade for this round.
